title: Removing Read & Replied from the Update Feed
excerpt: The Update Feed includes updates that I have already read, and replied to. Those “updates” should be removed, If I have already “read” the item and “replied” so then only "new updates will be shown there. Currently it’s …

posts.author: hillaryk (Hillary Kokajko)
posts.cookedHtml:
The Update Feed includes updates that I have already read, and replied to. Those “updates” should be removed, If I have already “read” the item and “replied” so then only "new updates will be shown there. Currently it’s a waste of time to look through All Updates. Even sorting by “@ I was mentioned” pulls things that I have already responded to.

Can this be an update to be fixed?
